'''tozamaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:pickleless|pickleless]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-z-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pickleless|pickleless]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| tozamaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || tozamithi || tozamiji || tozamishi || tozamiki
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || tozamuthu || tozamuju || tozamushu || tozamuku
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || tozamuthu || tozamuju || tozamushu || tozamuku
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || tozamufthuf || tozamufjuf || tozamufshuf || tozamufkuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || tozamethe || tozameje || tozameshe || tozameke
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || tozamotho || tozamojo || tozamosho || tozamoko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || tozamotho || tozamojo || tozamosho || tozamoko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || tozamofthof || tozamofjof || tozamofshof || tozamofkof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || tozamïfthïf || tozamïfjïf || tozamïfshïf || tozamïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || tozamïfthïf || tozamïfjïf || tozamïfshïf || tozamïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || tozamïfthïf || tozamïfjïf || tozamïfshïf || tozamïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || tozamïfthïf || tozamïfjïf || tozamïfshïf || tozamïfkïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || tozamæthæ || tozamæjæ || tozamæshæ || tozamækæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || tozamatha || tozamaja || tozamasha || tozamaka
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || tozamatha || tozamaja || tozamasha || tozamaka
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || tozamafthaf || tozamafjaf || tozamafshaf || tozamafkaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || tozamasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || tozamshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || tozamroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || tozammuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || tozamyaasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gotozamnkshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gotozamnkroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gotozamnkmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gotozamnkyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].none || tozazamasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || tozazamshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || tozazamroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || tozazammuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || tozazamyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gotozazamnkshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gotozazamnkroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gotozazamnkmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gotozazamnkyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].none || tezæmasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || tezæmshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || tezæmroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || tezæmmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || tezæmyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gotezæmnkshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gotezæmnkroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gotezæmnkmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gotezæmnkyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].none || tozfamasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || tozfamshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || tozfamroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || tozfammuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || tozfamyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gotozfamnkshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gotozfamnkroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gotozfamnkmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gotozfamnkyaasha
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
